text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship doesn't seem like herself today.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Mystery Adventures got canceled! It was my favorite show!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now they'll never feature me as one of the seven
wonders of the world...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship takes a while to recover from the
devastating news.
